Package com.rays.dao

Class UserDAOImpl

java.lang.Object
com.rays.common.BaseDAOImpl<UserDTO>
com.rays.dao.UserDAOImpl
All Implemented Interfaces:
BaseDAOInt<UserDTO>, UserDAOInt
@Repository public class UserDAOImpl extends BaseDAOImpl<UserDTO> implements UserDAOInt
Implementation class for User DAO operations. Handles database interactions related to User entity.
Author:
Saket

      protected void populate(UserDTO dto, UserContext userContext)
      Populates additional user details before persistence or retrieval. Sets role name, last login information, and image id.
